productDisplayName: UCB Men's Roundneck Striper Live In Dark Green Grey T-shirt
description: CompositionDark Grey round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with a ribbed neck and in-seam, half sleeves and graphic print on the frontFittingComfortWash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees Use mild detergent Do not dry clean Do not wring Do not bleach Do not scrub Dry flat in shade Cool iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Wash, dry and iron inside out The evening of August 27, 1986, remains fresh in the minds of baseball fans worldover. The nail biting match between San Diego Padres and New york Mets ran for more than three hours in front of a nearly 20,000 audience at the Jack Murphy stadium, with the Mets winning in style. Bring back memories of that fantabulous game with this black t-shirt from the United Colours of Benetton. Team it with jeans or shorts and baseball shoes for that cool, casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
